name: Simple Mention

releases.author: der-tobi
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Feat: Add ignored directories setting by @overflowy in https://github.com/der-tobi/obsidian-simple-mention/pull/8
* perf: Improve indexing performance by @der-tobi in https://github.com/der-tobi/obsidian-simple-mention/pull/11
* change: Remove suggestions and style from ignored directories by @der-tobi in https://github.com/der-tobi/obsidian-simple-mention/pull/12
* change: Remove mentions from codeblocks
* change: Only index markdown files

## New Contributors
* 🚀 @overflowy made their first contribution in https://github.com/der-tobi/obsidian-simple-mention/pull/8

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/der-tobi/obsidian-simple-mention/compare/0.1.0...1.0.0
